verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_1: Nun. By the pen and what they inscribe,
verse.verse_2: You are not, [O Muhammad], by the favor of your Lord, a madman.
verse.verse_3: And indeed, for you is a reward uninterrupted.
verse.verse_4: And indeed, you are of a great moral character.
verse.verse_5: So you will see and they will see
verse.verse_6: Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil].
verse.verse_7: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided.
verse.verse_8: Then do not obey the deniers.
verse.verse_9: They wish that you would soften [in your position], so they would soften [toward you].
verse.verse_10: And do not obey every worthless habitual swearer
verse.verse_11: [And] scorner, going about with malicious gossip -
verse.verse_12: A preventer of good, transgressing and sinful,
verse.verse_13: Cruel, moreover, and an illegitimate pretender.
verse.verse_14: Because he is a possessor of wealth and children,
verse.verse_15: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
verse.verse_16: We will brand him upon the snout.
verse.verse_17: Indeed, We have tried them as We tried the companions of the garden, when they swore to cut its fruit in the [early] morning
verse.verse_19: So there came upon the garden an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep.
verse.verse_20: And it became as though reaped.
verse.verse_21: And they called one another at morning,
verse.verse_22: [Saying], "Go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit."
verse.verse_23: So they set out, while lowering their voices,
verse.verse_24: [Saying], "There will surely not enter it today upon you [any] poor person."
verse.verse_25: And they went early in determination, [assuming themselves] able.
verse.verse_26: But when they saw it, they said, "Indeed, we are lost;
verse.verse_28: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, 'Why do you not exalt [Allah]?' "
verse.verse_29: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."
verse.verse_30: Then they approached one another, blaming each other.
verse.verse_31: They said, "O woe to us; indeed we were transgressors.
verse.verse_32: Perhaps our Lord will substitute for us [one] better than it. Indeed, we are toward our Lord desirous."
verse.verse_33: Such is the punishment [of this world]. And the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew.
verse.verse_34: Indeed, for the righteous with their Lord are the Gardens of Pleasure.
verse.verse_35: Then will We treat the Muslims like the criminals?
verse.verse_36: What is [the matter] with you? How do you judge?
verse.verse_37: Or do you have a scripture in which you learn
verse.verse_38: That indeed for you is whatever you choose?
verse.verse_39: Or do you have oaths [binding] upon Us, extending until the Day of Resurrection, that indeed for you is whatever you judge?
verse.verse_40: Ask them which of them, for that [claim], is responsible.
verse.verse_41: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful.
verse.verse_42: The Day the shin will be uncovered and they are invited to prostration but the disbelievers will not be able,
verse.verse_43: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. And they used to be invited to prostration while they were sound.
verse.verse_44: So leave Me, [O Muhammad], with [the matter of] whoever denies the Qur'an. We will progressively lead them [to punishment] from where they do not know.
verse.verse_45: And I will give them time. Indeed, My plan is firm.
verse.verse_46: Or do you ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
verse.verse_47: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?
verse.verse_48: Then be patient for the decision of your Lord, [O Muhammad], and be not like the companion of the fish when he called out while he was distressed.
verse.verse_49: If not that a favor from his Lord overtook him, he would have been thrown onto the naked shore while he was censured.
verse.verse_50: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.
verse.verse_51: And indeed, those who disbelieve would almost make you slip with their eyes when they hear the message, and they say, "Indeed, he is mad."
verse.verse_52: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds.
